hero.description: RESERVE YOUR EARLY ACCESS ON THE VIP LIST and participate in the greatest revolution in real asset tokenization.

features.description: We use state-of-the-art blockchain technology to ensure your investment is always safe and accessible.
features.f1_desc: Unlike purely digital promises, each token represents 1g of real physical gold in custody.
features.f2_desc: Stored in high-security vaults with independent and institutional-level auditing.
features.f3_desc: All physical stock is covered by global insurance policies against any eventuality.
features.f4_desc: Real-time verification of all reserves through smart contracts and proof of reserve.
features.f5_desc: Trade your mineral assets at any time, without banking windows or bureaucracy.
features.f6_desc: Uniting blockchain immutability with the tangibility of mineral assets in one place.

vip.title: VIP List
vip.description: Be one of the first to access the platform and gain exclusive launch benefits, such as reduced fees and welcome bonuses.

form.name: Full Name
form.success_desc: You have been added to the VIP list. We will contact you soon.

eco.title: GTK Ecosystem
eco.description: We transform physical gold bars into GTK digital assets, allowing immediate liquidity and elite custody for your mineral heritage.
